\ud83d\udd34 Struggling Learner.description: Students with low grades and high dropout risk. Needs urgent structured support.
\ud83d\udd34 Struggling Learner.priority: Catch up on failed units, attend all classes

schedule.Monday: 3h — Revise weakest subject + solve 10 practice problems
schedule.Tuesday: 3h — Attend extra tutorial session + complete missed assignments
schedule.Wednesday: 4h — Study group session + previous year exam practice
schedule.Thursday: 3h — Revise 2nd weakest subject + topic summary notes
schedule.Saturday: 4h — Full revision of week topics + teacher consultation
schedule.Sunday: 2h — Light reading + plan next week goals

\ud83d\udd34 Struggling Learner.alert: ⚠️ HIGH DROPOUT RISK — Immediate faculty intervention recommended

\ud83d\udfe1 Average Performer.description: Students with average performance needing consistency and better study habits.

schedule.Saturday: 4h — Deep dive into weak topic + lab practice

\ud83d\udd35 Late Bloomer.description: Students who started slow but showed improvement. Needs motivation and momentum.

schedule.Saturday: 3h — Review week + prepare for next unit

\ud83d\udd35 Late Bloomer.alert: 🔵 LOW-MEDIUM RISK — Encourage and track trajectory

\ud83d\udfe2 High Achiever.description: Top performers with excellent grades. Focus on depth, research, and advanced topics.
